reference: Hi! My husband and I have been trying for a baby for nine months. His semen analysis is normal and my hormone levels came back normal except for Thyroid-Stimulating Hormone at five point four seven. I am ovulating every cycle, but it seems that we can't get pregnant. Could high Thyroid-Stimulating Hormone cause problems with conception?
text: Hi, my husband and I have been trying for a baby for nine months. His semen analysis is normal, and my hormone level is normal, except for thyroid stimulating hormone at five point four seven. I am ovulating every cycle, but it seems that we can't conceive. Can high thyroid stimulating hormone cause problems with conception?
